lang_en: Eastern Arabic Numerals, Hebrew numerals, Judaeo-Arabic

description: Accounts in Judaeo-Arabic, most of the entries list varying quantities of Ottoman-era gold jadid coinage. Dating is 16th-17th-century based on the paleography and numismatic reference. Only one name is visible (verso upper left): Ḥayyīm al-Mlī__[?]. MCD.
tags: 16th or 17th c, numismatic dating, early modern
